scripts.build: npm run build -w @elder-tree/contracts && npm run build -w @elder-tree/api && npm run build -w @elder-tree/admin-web && npm run build -w @elder-tree/iot-bridge && npm run build -w @elder-tree/device-simulator
scripts.dev:api: npm run build:contracts && npm run dev -w @elder-tree/api
scripts.dev:web: npm run build:contracts && npm run dev -w @elder-tree/admin-web
scripts.dev:simulator: npm run build:contracts && npm run dev -w @elder-tree/device-simulator
scripts.test: npm run test -w @elder-tree/contracts && npm run test -w @elder-tree/api && npm run test -w @elder-tree/iot-bridge
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:contracts && npm run typecheck -w @elder-tree/contracts && npm run typecheck -w @elder-tree/api && npm run typecheck -w @elder-tree/admin-web && npm run typecheck -w @elder-tree/iot-bridge && npm run typecheck -w @elder-tree/device-simulator
